languages.text: "Приказываю вам обоим немедленно явиться на мостик, я рассужу вас".
"I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."
languages.original_text: "Приказываю вам обоим немедленно явиться на мостик, я рассужу вас".

traits.locale_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."
"I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."
"I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."
"I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

languages.text: «Les ordeno a ambos que acudan inmediatamente al puente para resolver el problema».
languages.original_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

traits.locale_text: «Les ordeno a ambos que acudan inmediatamente al puente para resolver el problema».

languages.text: « Je vous ordonne à tous les deux de vous présenter immédiatement sur la passerelle. Je vais régler cette affaire. »
languages.original_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous ordonne à tous les deux de vous présenter immédiatement sur la passerelle. Je vais régler cette affaire. »

languages.text: “我命令你们即刻前往舰桥。等我定夺。”
languages.original_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

traits.locale_text: “我命令你们即刻前往舰桥。等我定夺。”

languages.text: "Ich befehle Euch beiden, Euch umgehend auf der Brücke zu melden. Ich regle das."
languages.original_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

traits.locale_text: Ich befehle Euch beiden, Euch umgehend auf der Brücke zu melden. Ich regle das.

languages.text: "İkiniz de derhâl köprüye rapor vereceksiniz. Bu mevzuyla bizzat ilgileneceğim."
languages.original_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

traits.locale_text: "İkiniz de derhâl köprüye rapor vereceksiniz. Bu mevzuyla bizzat ilgileneceğim."

languages.text: 「両者ともに、直ちにブリッジへ出頭せよ。私が決着をつける」
languages.original_text: "I order you both to report to the bridge immediately. I shall settle this."

traits.locale_text: 「両者ともに、直ちにブリッジへ出頭せよ。私が決着をつける」
